---
title: "Olink_2_cohorts"
author: "GinoBonazza (ginoandrea.bonazza@usz.ch)"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r knitr config, include=FALSE, cache=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(dpi = 300, fig.align = "center")
```

## Setup

```{r setup, class.source = "fold-hide"}
# Get current file name to make folder
current_file <- "Olink_2_cohorts"

# Load libraries
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(here)
library(enrichplot)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(magrittr)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(S4Vectors)
library(pheatmap)
library(png)
library(gridExtra)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(Matrix.utils)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(scater)
library(patchwork)
library(statmod)
library(qs2)
library(statmod)
library(rtracklayer)
library(png)
library(reactable)
library(UpSetR)
library(limma)
library(igraph)
library(gridExtra) 
library(ggpubr)
library(DESeq2)
library(gprofiler2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationHub)
library(ReactomePA)
library(UpSetR)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(survival)
library(broom)
library(circlize)
library(variancePartition)

#Output paths
output_dir_data <- here::here("output", current_file)
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_data)) dir.create(output_dir_data)

if (!dir.exists(here::here("docs", "figure"))) dir.create(here::here("docs", "figure"))

output_dir_figs <- here::here("docs", "figure", paste0(current_file, ".Rmd"))
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_figs)) dir.create(output_dir_figs)
```

## Import data

Olink data Zurich and Poland

```{r read data}
data_z <- qs_read(here::here("data", "o37198_2025-02-27_olink_SummarizedExperiment.qs2"))

clin_z <- read_excel(here::here("data", "Metadata_Olink_analysis.xlsx"))

meta_z <- colData(data_z) %>% data.frame()
isOutlierColumn <- meta_z$Plate == "P0194" & meta_z$Col %in% c("3", "4")
table(isOutlierColumn)
use <- meta_z$SampleType %in% c("Serum") & meta_z$Group %in% c("SSc-PAH", "SSc-noPAH") & !isOutlierColumn
table(use)
data_z <- data_z[ , use]
meta_z <- meta_z[use, ]
rownames(meta_z) <- gsub("_P0194", "", rownames(meta_z))
meta_z$Barcode <- rownames(meta_z)
rownames(data_z) <- data_z@elementMetadata@listData[["Gene"]]
rownames(data_z@assays@data@listData[["npx"]]) <- data_z@elementMetadata@listData[["Gene"]]
data_z <- assay(data_z, "npx")
data_z <- as.data.frame(data_z[-c(1:3), ])
colnames(data_z) <- rownames(meta_z)

clin_z <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))
dim(data_z)
table(clin_z$Group)


data_p <- read.delim(here::here("data", "OLINK_PL", "quant.xls"), sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE)

clin_p <- read_excel(here::here("data", "OLINK_PL", "Metadata_Olink_PL.xlsx"))

rownames(data_p) <- sub("_.*", "", data_p$SampleID)
data_p <- data_p[, -1]
keep <- intersect(colnames(data_p), clin_p$Barcode)
data_p <- data_p[, keep, drop = FALSE]
dim(data_p)
table(clin_p$Group)
```

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10.8}
barcodes <- colnames(data_z)

grp <- clin_z$Group[match(barcodes, clin_z$Barcode)]
cmp <- clin_z$COMPERA_4strata[match(barcodes, clin_z$Barcode)]
cmp <- factor(cmp, levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high"))
sex <- clin_z$Sex[match(barcodes, clin_z$Barcode)]

# --- colors ---
cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH"="#004C8C", "SSc-PAH"="#A63A2A")
cols_compera <- c(
  "low"               = "#9CA3AF",   # grey
  "intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "high"              = "#A63A2A"
)
cols_sex <- c("F"="green4", "M"="yellow2")

# --- z-score per protein (row) ---
matz <- t(scale(t(data_z)))
matz[is.nan(matz)] <- 0

# heatmap colors
hm_cols <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))

# column annotations (COMPERA NAs shown as light grey)
ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group   = grp,
  COMPERA = cmp,
  Sex = sex,
  col = list(Group = cols_group, COMPERA = cols_compera, Sex = cols_sex),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB",
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    Group   = list(title = "Group"),
    COMPERA = list(title = "Risk (COMPERA)"),
    Sex   = list(title = "Sex")
  )
)

# --- draw (all proteins, no row names, default clustering, no group split) ---
Heatmap(
  matz,
  name = "Z-score",
  col = hm_cols,
  top_annotation = ha,
  show_row_names = FALSE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL
) |>
  draw(heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
```

```{r, fig.height=8, fig.width=10.8}
barcodes <- colnames(data_p)

grp <- clin_p$Group[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]
cmp <- clin_p$Compera_4strata[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]
cmp <- factor(cmp, levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High"))
ori <- clin_p$Origin[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]
sex <- clin_p$Sex[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]

# --- colors ---
cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH"="#004C8C", "SSc-PAH"="#A63A2A")
cols_compera <- c(
  "Low"               = "#9CA3AF",   # grey
  "Intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "Intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "High"              = "#A63A2A"
)
cols_origin <- c("Krakow"="orange", "Lublin"="purple")
cols_sex <- c("F"="green4", "M"="yellow2")

# --- z-score per protein (row) ---
matz <- t(scale(t(data_p)))
matz[is.nan(matz)] <- 0

# heatmap colors
hm_cols <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))

# column annotations (COMPERA NAs shown as light grey)
ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group   = grp,
  COMPERA = cmp,
  Origin = ori,
  Sex = sex,
  col = list(Group = cols_group, COMPERA = cols_compera, Origin = cols_origin, Sex = cols_sex),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB",
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    Group   = list(title = "Group"),
    COMPERA = list(title = "Risk (COMPERA)"),
    Origin = list(title = "Origin"),
    Sex   = list(title = "Sex")
  )
)

# --- draw (all proteins, no row names, default clustering, no group split) ---
Heatmap(
  matz,
  name = "Z-score",
  col = hm_cols,
  top_annotation = ha,
  show_row_names = FALSE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL
) |>
  draw(heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
```

```{r heatmap_z_top100var, fig.height=10.8, fig.width=10.8}
barcodes <- colnames(data_z)

grp <- clin_z$Group[match(barcodes, clin_z$Barcode)]
cmp <- clin_z$COMPERA_4strata[match(barcodes, clin_z$Barcode)]
cmp <- factor(cmp, levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high"))
sex <- clin_z$Sex[match(barcodes, clin_z$Barcode)]

# --- colors ---
cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH"="#004C8C", "SSc-PAH"="#A63A2A")
cols_compera <- c(
  "low"               = "#9CA3AF",
  "intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "high"              = "#A63A2A"
)
cols_sex <- c("F"="green4", "M"="yellow2")

# --- pick top 100 variable proteins (rows) ---
vars <- apply(data_z, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top100 <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:100]
mat_top <- as.matrix(data_z[top100, , drop = FALSE])

# --- z-score per protein (row) ---
matz <- t(scale(t(mat_top)))
matz[is.nan(matz)] <- 0

hm_cols <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))

ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group   = grp,
  COMPERA = cmp,
  Sex     = sex,
  col = list(Group = cols_group, COMPERA = cols_compera, Sex = cols_sex),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB",
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    Group   = list(title = "Group"),
    COMPERA = list(title = "Risk (COMPERA)"),
    Sex     = list(title = "Sex")
  )
)

Heatmap(
  matz,
  name = "Z-score",
  col = hm_cols,
  top_annotation = ha,
  show_row_names = TRUE,              
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8.5),
  row_title = "Top 100 variable proteins",
  column_title = NULL
) |>
  draw(heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
```

```{r heatmap_p_top100var, fig.height=10.88, fig.width=10.8}
stopifnot(exists("data_p"), exists("clin_p"))

barcodes <- colnames(data_p)

grp <- clin_p$Group[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]
cmp <- clin_p$Compera_4strata[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]
cmp <- factor(cmp, levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High"))
ori <- clin_p$Origin[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]
sex <- clin_p$Sex[match(barcodes, clin_p$Barcode)]

# --- colors ---
cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH"="#004C8C", "SSc-PAH"="#A63A2A")
cols_compera <- c(
  "Low"               = "#9CA3AF",
  "Intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "Intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "High"              = "#A63A2A"
)
cols_origin <- c("Krakow"="orange", "Lublin"="purple")
cols_sex <- c("F"="green4", "M"="yellow2")

# --- pick top 100 variable proteins (rows) ---
vars <- apply(data_p, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top100 <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:100]
mat_top <- as.matrix(data_p[top100, , drop = FALSE])

# --- z-score per protein (row) ---
matz <- t(scale(t(mat_top)))
matz[is.nan(matz)] <- 0

hm_cols <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))

ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group   = grp,
  COMPERA = cmp,
  Origin  = ori,
  Sex     = sex,
  col = list(Group = cols_group, COMPERA = cols_compera, Origin = cols_origin, Sex = cols_sex),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB",
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    Group   = list(title = "Group"),
    COMPERA = list(title = "Risk (COMPERA)"),
    Origin  = list(title = "Origin"),
    Sex     = list(title = "Sex")
  )
)

Heatmap(
  matz,
  name = "Z-score",
  col = hm_cols,
  top_annotation = ha,
  show_row_names = TRUE,              # set FALSE if you want to hide protein names
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8.5),
  row_title = "Top 100 variable proteins",
  column_title = NULL
) |>
  draw(heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
```
```{r pca_z_group, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=5.4}
# PCA (samples as rows)
pca <- prcomp(t(as.matrix(data_z)), scale. = TRUE)
pvar <- (pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100

df <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca$x[, 2],
  Group = clin_z$Group[match(rownames(pca$x), clin_z$Barcode)]
)

cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH" = "#004C8C", "SSc-PAH" = "#A63A2A")

ggplot(df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Group)) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(fill = Group), type = "norm", level = 0.95,
               geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.10, color = NA) +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", level = 0.95, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_group) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_group) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pvar[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pvar[2], 1), "%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r pca_z_compera, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=5.4}
# --- subset to SSc-PAH only ---
keep <- clin_z$Group == "SSc-PAH"
barcodes_keep <- clin_z$Barcode[keep]

data_sub <- data_z[, colnames(data_z) %in% barcodes_keep, drop = FALSE]
clin_sub <- clin_z[match(colnames(data_sub), clin_z$Barcode), ]

# PCA
pca <- prcomp(t(as.matrix(data_sub)), scale. = TRUE)
pvar <- (pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100

df <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca$x[, 2],
  COMPERA = factor(
    clin_sub$COMPERA_4strata,
    levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high")
  )
)

cols_compera_z <- c(
  "low"               = "#9CA3AF",
  "intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "high"              = "#A63A2A"
)

ggplot(df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = COMPERA)) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(fill = COMPERA), type = "norm", level = 0.90,
               geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.10, color = NA) +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", level = 0.90, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_compera_z, name = "Risk (COMPERA)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_compera_z,  name = "Risk (COMPERA)") +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pvar[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pvar[2], 1), "%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r pca_p_group, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=5.4}
pca <- prcomp(t(as.matrix(data_p)), scale. = TRUE)
pvar <- (pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100

df <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca$x[, 2],
  Group = clin_p$Group[match(rownames(pca$x), clin_p$Barcode)]
)

cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH" = "#004C8C", "SSc-PAH" = "#A63A2A")

ggplot(df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Group)) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(fill = Group), type = "norm", level = 0.95,
               geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.10, color = NA) +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", level = 0.95, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_group) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_group) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pvar[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pvar[2], 1), "%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r pca_p_compera, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=5.4}
# --- subset to SSc-PAH only ---
keep <- clin_p$Group == "SSc-PAH"
barcodes_keep <- clin_p$Barcode[keep]

data_sub <- data_p[, colnames(data_p) %in% barcodes_keep, drop = FALSE]
clin_sub <- clin_p[match(colnames(data_sub), clin_p$Barcode), ]

# PCA
pca <- prcomp(t(as.matrix(data_sub)), scale. = TRUE)
pvar <- (pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100

df <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca$x[, 2],
  COMPERA = factor(
    clin_sub$Compera_4strata,
    levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High")
  )
)

cols_compera_p <- c(
  "Low"               = "#9CA3AF",
  "Intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "Intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "High"              = "#A63A2A"
)

ggplot(df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = COMPERA)) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(fill = COMPERA), type = "norm", level = 0.90,
               geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.10, color = NA) +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", level = 0.90, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols_compera_p, name = "Risk (COMPERA)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols_compera_p,  name = "Risk (COMPERA)") +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pvar[1], 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pvar[2], 1), "%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

## Variance partitioning

```{r vp_z_all, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=6.5}
# expression: proteins x samples
expr <- as.matrix(data_z)

# metadata aligned to columns of expr
meta <- clin_z |>
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(expr)) |>
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

# variables for this model (Zurich: NO Origin in all-samples model)
vars <- c("Group", "Age", "Sex", "Sample_age_days")
meta <- meta |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(Group),
    Sex   = factor(Sex)
  )

# keep complete cases for model variables
n_before <- nrow(meta)

meta <- meta[complete.cases(meta[, vars]), , drop = FALSE]
expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

n_after <- nrow(meta)
message("Zurich (all): ", n_after, " / ", n_before, " samples used")

form <- ~ Group + Age + Sex + Sample_age_days

vp <- fitExtractVarPartModel(expr, form, meta)
colnames(vp) <- gsub("`", "", colnames(vp))

# quick summaries
vp_mean <- sort(colMeans(vp), decreasing = TRUE)
df <- data.frame(variable = names(vp_mean), value = vp_mean)

ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(variable, -value), y = value)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean fraction of variance explained",
       title = "Zurich: all samples") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

plotVarPart(vp) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r vp_z_pah, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=6.5}
expr <- as.matrix(data_z)

meta <- clin_z |>
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(expr)) |>
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") |>
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

# requested covariates (Origin not available in Zurich -> not included)
vars <- c("Age", "Sex", "TAPSE_sPAP", "Creatinine", "ILDonHRCT")
meta <- meta |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    ILDonHRCT = factor(ILDonHRCT)
  )

n_before <- nrow(meta)

meta <- meta[complete.cases(meta[, vars]), , drop = FALSE]
expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

n_after <- nrow(meta)
message("Zurich (all): ", n_after, " / ", n_before, " samples used")

form <- ~ Age + Sex  + TAPSE_sPAP + Creatinine + ILDonHRCT + mPAP_mmHg 

vp <- fitExtractVarPartModel(expr, form, meta)
colnames(vp) <- gsub("`", "", colnames(vp))

vp_mean <- sort(colMeans(vp), decreasing = TRUE)
df <- data.frame(variable = names(vp_mean), value = vp_mean)

ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(variable, -value), y = value)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean fraction of variance explained",
       title = "Zurich: SSc-PAH only") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

plotVarPart(vp) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r vp_p_all, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=6.5}
library(variancePartition)

expr <- as.matrix(data_p)

meta <- clin_p |>
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(expr)) |>
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

# requested covariates
vars <- c("Group", "Age", "Sex", "Sample_age", "Origin")
meta <- meta |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group  = factor(Group),
    Sex    = factor(Sex),
    Origin = factor(Origin)
  )

n_before <- nrow(meta)

meta <- meta[complete.cases(meta[, vars]), , drop = FALSE]
expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

n_after <- nrow(meta)
message("Zurich (all): ", n_after, " / ", n_before, " samples used")


form <- ~ Group + Age + Sex + Sample_age + Origin

vp <- fitExtractVarPartModel(expr, form, meta)
colnames(vp) <- gsub("`", "", colnames(vp))

vp_mean <- sort(colMeans(vp), decreasing = TRUE)
df <- data.frame(variable = names(vp_mean), value = vp_mean)

ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(variable, -value), y = value)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean fraction of variance explained",
       title = "Poland: all samples") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

plotVarPart(vp) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r vp_p_pah, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=6.5}
library(variancePartition)

expr <- as.matrix(data_p)

meta <- clin_p |>
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(expr)) |>
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") |>
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

# requested covariates
vars <- c("Age", "Sex", "TAPSE_sPAP", "Creatinine", "ILD")
meta <- meta |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Sex    = factor(Sex),
    ILD    = factor(ILD)
  )

n_before <- nrow(meta)

meta <- meta[complete.cases(meta[, vars]), , drop = FALSE]
expr <- expr[, rownames(meta), drop = FALSE]

n_after <- nrow(meta)
message("Zurich (all): ", n_after, " / ", n_before, " samples used")

form <- ~ Age + Sex + Creatinine + ILD + TAPSE_sPAP

vp <- fitExtractVarPartModel(expr, form, meta)
colnames(vp) <- gsub("`", "", colnames(vp))

vp_mean <- sort(colMeans(vp), decreasing = TRUE)
df <- data.frame(variable = names(vp_mean), value = vp_mean)

ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(variable, -value), y = value)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Mean fraction of variance explained",
       title = "Poland: SSc-PAH only") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

plotVarPart(vp) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```



## Differential expression analysis

```{r de_group_zurich}
# --- prepare metadata aligned to expression ---
meta_z_de <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH")),
    Sex   = factor(Sex),
    Age   = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

# keep only complete cases for model variables
meta_z_de <- meta_z_de[complete.cases(meta_z_de[, c("Group", "Age", "Sex")]), , drop = FALSE]

expr_z_de <- as.matrix(data_z[, rownames(meta_z_de), drop = FALSE])

# --- design: Group + Age + Sex ---
design_z <- model.matrix(~ Group + Age + Sex, data = meta_z_de)

# rescale numeric covariate(s) like in your code
if ("Age" %in% colnames(design_z)) design_z[, "Age"] <- rescale(design_z[, "Age"])

# --- fit limma ---
fit_z <- lmFit(expr_z_de, design_z)
fit_z <- eBayes(fit_z)

# coefficient name for GroupSSc-PAH (vs reference SSc-noPAH)
coef_group_z <- grep("^Group", colnames(design_z), value = TRUE)[1]

DE_z <- topTable(fit_z, coef = coef_group_z, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
DE_z$Gene <- rownames(DE_z)

DE_z_signif <- DE_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

# write outputs (same style as your loop, but single comparison)
write.csv(DE_z,
          file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_Results_Group_SScPAH_vs_noPAH_Zurich.csv"),
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(DE_z_signif,
          file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_Significant_Group_SScPAH_vs_noPAH_Zurich.csv"),
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

# store for volcano chunk
n_z <- ncol(expr_z_de)
```

```{r de_group_poland}
meta_p_de <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH")),
    Sex   = factor(Sex),
    Age   = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_p_de <- meta_p_de[complete.cases(meta_p_de[, c("Group", "Age", "Sex")]), , drop = FALSE]

expr_p_de <- as.matrix(data_p[, rownames(meta_p_de), drop = FALSE])

design_p <- model.matrix(~ Group + Age + Sex, data = meta_p_de)
if ("Age" %in% colnames(design_p)) design_p[, "Age"] <- rescale(design_p[, "Age"])

fit_p <- lmFit(expr_p_de, design_p)
fit_p <- eBayes(fit_p)

coef_group_p <- grep("^Group", colnames(design_p), value = TRUE)[1]

DE_p <- topTable(fit_p, coef = coef_group_p, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
DE_p$Gene <- rownames(DE_p)

DE_p_signif <- DE_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

write.csv(DE_p,
          file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_Results_Group_SScPAH_vs_noPAH_Poland.csv"),
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(DE_p_signif,
          file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_Significant_Group_SScPAH_vs_noPAH_Poland.csv"),
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

n_p <- ncol(expr_p_de)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_z))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_z))

keyvals[DE_z$logFC > 0.5 & DE_z$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Increased"

keyvals[DE_z$logFC < -0.5 & DE_z$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Decreased"

volcano_z <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_z,
  lab = rownames(DE_z),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Zurich cohort\nSSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH\nn = ", n_z)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_z
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_p))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_p))

keyvals[DE_p$logFC > 0.5 & DE_p$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Increased"

keyvals[DE_p$logFC < -0.5 & DE_p$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Decreased"

volcano_p <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_p,
  lab = rownames(DE_p),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Poland cohort\nSSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH\nn = ", n_p)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_p
```

```{r de_tapse_zurich_pah}
meta_z_de <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_z_de <- meta_z_de[
  complete.cases(meta_z_de[, c("TAPSE_sPAP", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_z_de <- as.matrix(data_z[, rownames(meta_z_de), drop = FALSE])

design_z <- model.matrix(~ TAPSE_sPAP + Age + Sex, data = meta_z_de)

design_z[, "TAPSE_sPAP"] <- rescale(design_z[, "TAPSE_sPAP"])
design_z[, "Age"]        <- rescale(design_z[, "Age"])

fit_z <- lmFit(expr_z_de, design_z)
fit_z <- eBayes(fit_z)

DE_z_TAPSE <- topTable(
  fit_z,
  coef = "TAPSE_sPAP",
  number = Inf,
  adjust.method = "BH"
)

DE_z_TAPSE$Gene <- rownames(DE_z_TAPSE)

DE_z_TAPSE_signif <- DE_z_TAPSE %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

write.csv(
  DE_z_TAPSE,
  file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_TAPSE_sPAP_SScPAH_Zurich.csv"),
  quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  DE_z_TAPSE_signif,
  file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_TAPSE_sPAP_SScPAH_Zurich_significant.csv"),
  quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE
)

n_z_TAPSE <- ncol(expr_z_de)
```

```{r de_tapse_poland_pah}
meta_p_de <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_p_de <- meta_p_de[
  complete.cases(meta_p_de[, c("TAPSE_sPAP", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_p_de <- as.matrix(data_p[, rownames(meta_p_de), drop = FALSE])

design_p <- model.matrix(~ TAPSE_sPAP + Age + Sex, data = meta_p_de)

design_p[, "TAPSE_sPAP"] <- rescale(design_p[, "TAPSE_sPAP"])
design_p[, "Age"]        <- rescale(design_p[, "Age"])

fit_p <- lmFit(expr_p_de, design_p)
fit_p <- eBayes(fit_p)

DE_p_TAPSE <- topTable(
  fit_p,
  coef = "TAPSE_sPAP",
  number = Inf,
  adjust.method = "BH"
)

DE_p_TAPSE$Gene <- rownames(DE_p_TAPSE)

DE_p_TAPSE_signif <- DE_p_TAPSE %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

write.csv(
  DE_p_TAPSE,
  file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_TAPSE_sPAP_SScPAH_Poland.csv"),
  quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  DE_p_TAPSE_signif,
  file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_TAPSE_sPAP_SScPAH_Poland_significant.csv"),
  quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE
)

n_p_TAPSE <- ncol(expr_p_de)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_z_TAPSE))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_z_TAPSE))

keyvals[DE_z_TAPSE$logFC > 0.5 & DE_z_TAPSE$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Increased"

keyvals[DE_z_TAPSE$logFC < -0.5 & DE_z_TAPSE$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Decreased"

volcano_z_TAPSE <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_z_TAPSE,
  lab = rownames(DE_z_TAPSE),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Zurich cohort SSc-PAH\nTAPSE_sPAP\nn = ", n_z_TAPSE)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_z_TAPSE
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_p_TAPSE))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_p_TAPSE))

keyvals[DE_p_TAPSE$logFC > 0.5 & DE_p_TAPSE$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Increased"

keyvals[DE_p_TAPSE$logFC < -0.5 & DE_p_TAPSE$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Decreased"

volcano_p_TAPSE <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_p_TAPSE,
  lab = rownames(DE_p_TAPSE),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Poland cohort SSc-PAH\nTAPSE_sPAP\nn = ", n_p_TAPSE)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_p_TAPSE
```

```{r}
meta_z_bin <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    TAPSE_group = ifelse(TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32, "Low", "High"),
    TAPSE_group = factor(TAPSE_group, levels = c("High", "Low")),
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_z_bin <- meta_z_bin[
  complete.cases(meta_z_bin[, c("TAPSE_group", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_z_bin <- as.matrix(data_z[, rownames(meta_z_bin), drop = FALSE])

design_z_bin <- model.matrix(~ TAPSE_group + Age + Sex, data = meta_z_bin)
design_z_bin[, "Age"] <- rescale(design_z_bin[, "Age"])

fit_z_bin <- lmFit(expr_z_bin, design_z_bin)
fit_z_bin <- eBayes(fit_z_bin)

coef_bin_z <- grep("^TAPSE_group", colnames(design_z_bin), value = TRUE)[1]

DE_z_bin <- topTable(fit_z_bin, coef = coef_bin_z, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
DE_z_bin$Gene <- rownames(DE_z_bin)

DE_z_bin_signif <- DE_z_bin %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

n_z_bin <- ncol(expr_z_bin)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_z_bin))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_z_bin))

keyvals[DE_z_bin$logFC > 0.5 & DE_z_bin$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Higher in Low TAPSE_sPAP"

keyvals[DE_z_bin$logFC < -0.5 & DE_z_bin$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Higher in High TAPSE_sPAP"

volcano_z_bin <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_z_bin,
  lab = rownames(DE_z_bin),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Zurich cohort SSc-PAH\nTAPSE/sPAP<0.32 vs ≥0.32\nn = ", n_z_bin)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_z_bin
```

```{r}
meta_p_bin <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    TAPSE_group = ifelse(TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32, "Low", "High"),
    TAPSE_group = factor(TAPSE_group, levels = c("High", "Low")),
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_p_bin <- meta_p_bin[
  complete.cases(meta_p_bin[, c("TAPSE_group", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_p_bin <- as.matrix(data_p[, rownames(meta_p_bin), drop = FALSE])

design_p_bin <- model.matrix(~ TAPSE_group + Age + Sex, data = meta_p_bin)
design_p_bin[, "Age"] <- rescale(design_p_bin[, "Age"])

fit_p_bin <- lmFit(expr_p_bin, design_p_bin)
fit_p_bin <- eBayes(fit_p_bin)

coef_bin_p <- grep("^TAPSE_group", colnames(design_p_bin), value = TRUE)[1]

DE_p_bin <- topTable(fit_p_bin, coef = coef_bin_p, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
DE_p_bin$Gene <- rownames(DE_p_bin)

DE_p_bin_signif <- DE_p_bin %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

n_p_bin <- ncol(expr_p_bin)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_p_bin))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_p_bin))

keyvals[DE_p_bin$logFC > 0.5 & DE_p_bin$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Higher in Low TAPSE_sPAP"

keyvals[DE_p_bin$logFC < -0.5 & DE_p_bin$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Higher in High TAPSE_sPAP"

volcano_p_bin <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_p_bin,
  lab = rownames(DE_p_bin),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Poland cohort SSc-PAH\nTAPSE/sPAP<0.32 vs ≥0.32\nn = ", n_p_bin)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_p_bin
```

```{r}
meta_z_comp <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    COMPERA_number = as.numeric(COMPERA_number),
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_z_comp <- meta_z_comp[
  complete.cases(meta_z_comp[, c("COMPERA_number", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_z_comp <- as.matrix(data_z[, rownames(meta_z_comp), drop = FALSE])

design_z_comp <- model.matrix(~ COMPERA_number + Age + Sex, data = meta_z_comp)

design_z_comp[, "COMPERA_number"] <- rescale(design_z_comp[, "COMPERA_number"])
design_z_comp[, "Age"]            <- rescale(design_z_comp[, "Age"])

fit_z_comp <- lmFit(expr_z_comp, design_z_comp)
fit_z_comp <- eBayes(fit_z_comp)

DE_z_comp <- topTable(
  fit_z_comp,
  coef = "COMPERA_number",
  number = Inf,
  adjust.method = "BH"
)

DE_z_comp$Gene <- rownames(DE_z_comp)

DE_z_comp_signif <- DE_z_comp %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

n_z_comp <- ncol(expr_z_comp)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_z_comp))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_z_comp))

keyvals[DE_z_comp$logFC > 0.5 & DE_z_comp$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Positive association"

keyvals[DE_z_comp$logFC < -0.5 & DE_z_comp$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Negative association"

volcano_z_comp <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_z_comp,
  lab = rownames(DE_z_comp),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Zurich cohort SSc-PAH\nCOMPERA_number\nn = ", n_z_comp)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_z_comp
```

```{r}
meta_p_comp <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Compera_number = as.numeric(Compera_number),
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

meta_p_comp <- meta_p_comp[
  complete.cases(meta_p_comp[, c("Compera_number", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_p_comp <- as.matrix(data_p[, rownames(meta_p_comp), drop = FALSE])

design_p_comp <- model.matrix(~ Compera_number + Age + Sex, data = meta_p_comp)

design_p_comp[, "Compera_number"] <- rescale(design_p_comp[, "Compera_number"])
design_p_comp[, "Age"]            <- rescale(design_p_comp[, "Age"])

fit_p_comp <- lmFit(expr_p_comp, design_p_comp)
fit_p_comp <- eBayes(fit_p_comp)

DE_p_comp <- topTable(
  fit_p_comp,
  coef = "Compera_number",
  number = Inf,
  adjust.method = "BH"
)

DE_p_comp$Gene <- rownames(DE_p_comp)

DE_p_comp_signif <- DE_p_comp %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.1, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

n_p_comp <- ncol(expr_p_comp)
```

```{r, fig.height=4, fig.width=3, warning=FALSE}
keyvals <- rep("grey", nrow(DE_p_comp))
names(keyvals) <- rep("Not significant", nrow(DE_p_comp))

keyvals[DE_p_comp$logFC > 0.5 & DE_p_comp$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#A63A2A"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#A63A2A"] <- "Positive association"

keyvals[DE_p_comp$logFC < -0.5 & DE_p_comp$adj.P.Val < 0.1] <- "#004C8C"
names(keyvals)[keyvals == "#004C8C"] <- "Negative association"

volcano_p_comp <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DE_p_comp,
  lab = rownames(DE_p_comp),
  x = "logFC",
  y = "adj.P.Val",
  labSize = 0,
  titleLabSize = 13,
  subtitleLabSize = 14,
  axisLabSize = 12,
  captionLabSize = 0,
  pointSize = 1,
  FCcutoff = 0.5,
  pCutoff  = 0.1,
  ylim = c(0, 4),
  colCustom = keyvals,
  colAlpha = 1,
  drawConnectors = FALSE,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title = paste0("Poland cohort\nSSc-PAH only\nCOMPERA_number\nn = ", n_p_comp)
) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

volcano_p_comp
```

```{r cor_group, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
df_group <- dplyr::inner_join(
  DE_z[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  DE_p[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  by = "Gene",
  suffix = c("_z", "_p")
)

cor_group <- cor(df_group$logFC_z, df_group$logFC_p)

ggplot(df_group, aes(logFC_z, logFC_p)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Zurich logFC",
    y = "Poland logFC",
    title = paste0("SSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH\nr = ", round(cor_group, 2))
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r cor_tapse_cont, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
df_tapse <- dplyr::inner_join(
  DE_z_TAPSE[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  DE_p_TAPSE[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  by = "Gene",
  suffix = c("_z", "_p")
)

cor_tapse <- cor(df_tapse$logFC_z, df_tapse$logFC_p)

ggplot(df_tapse, aes(logFC_z, logFC_p)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Zurich logFC",
    y = "Poland logFC",
    title = paste0("TAPSE_sPAP (continuous)\nr = ", round(cor_tapse, 2))
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r cor_tapse_binary, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
df_tapse_bin <- dplyr::inner_join(
  DE_z_bin[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  DE_p_bin[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  by = "Gene",
  suffix = c("_z", "_p")
)

cor_tapse_bin <- cor(df_tapse_bin$logFC_z, df_tapse_bin$logFC_p)

ggplot(df_tapse_bin, aes(logFC_z, logFC_p)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Zurich logFC",
    y = "Poland logFC",
    title = paste0("TAPSE groups (<0.32 vs ≥0.32)\nr = ", round(cor_tapse_bin, 2))
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r cor_compera, fig.height=4, fig.width=4}
df_comp <- dplyr::inner_join(
  DE_z_comp[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  DE_p_comp[, c("Gene", "logFC")],
  by = "Gene",
  suffix = c("_z", "_p")
)

cor_comp <- cor(df_comp$logFC_z, df_comp$logFC_p)

ggplot(df_comp, aes(logFC_z, logFC_p)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Zurich logFC",
    y = "Poland logFC",
    title = paste0("COMPERA_number\nr = ", round(cor_comp, 2))
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r score_heatmap_helpers, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# score for ranking (for GSEA later)
add_score <- function(de) {
  de$score <- de$logFC * (-log10(de$P.Value))
  de
}

# heatmap: top20 up/down by score
plot_top_score_heatmap <- function(expr, clin, de, samples, ha, title_text) {
  de <- add_score(de)

  de_sub <- de[match(rownames(expr), de$Gene), ]
  rownames(de_sub) <- de_sub$Gene

  up   <- de_sub[order(de_sub$score, decreasing = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  down <- de_sub[order(de_sub$score, decreasing = FALSE), , drop = FALSE]

  top_up   <- rownames(up)[1:20]
  top_down <- rownames(down)[1:20]

  genes_use <- c(top_up, top_down)

  mat <- as.matrix(expr[genes_use, samples, drop = FALSE])

  # z-score per protein (row), same as your heatmaps
  matz <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  matz[is.nan(matz)] <- 0

  hm_cols <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))

  Heatmap(
    matz,
    name = "Z-score",
    col = hm_cols,
    top_annotation = ha,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_columns = TRUE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 13),
    show_column_names = TRUE,
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    row_title = title_text,
    column_title = NULL,
    height = unit(nrow(matz) * 5, "mm")
  ) |>
    draw(heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
}
```

```{r add_tapse_group}
clin_z <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    TAPSE_group = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)      ~ NA_character_,
      TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32      ~ "<0.32",
      TAPSE_sPAP >= 0.32     ~ "≥0.32"
    ),
    TAPSE_group = factor(TAPSE_group, levels = c("≥0.32", "<0.32"))
  )

clin_p <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    TAPSE_group = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)      ~ NA_character_,
      TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32      ~ "<0.32",
      TAPSE_sPAP >= 0.32     ~ "≥0.32"
    ),
    TAPSE_group = factor(TAPSE_group, levels = c("≥0.32", "<0.32"))
  )
```

```{r heatmaps_scores_zurich_tapseGroup, fig.height=10, fig.width=10.8}
# ---- add TAPSE/sPAP group to clin_z once ----
clin_z <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    `TAPSE/sPAP` = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)  ~ NA_character_,
      TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32  ~ "<0.32",
      TRUE               ~ "≥0.32"
    ),
    `TAPSE/sPAP` = factor(`TAPSE/sPAP`, levels = c("≥0.32", "<0.32"))
  )

# ---- colors (same palette logic) ----
cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH"="#004C8C", "SSc-PAH"="#A63A2A")
cols_compera <- c(
  "low"               = "#9CA3AF",
  "intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "high"              = "#A63A2A"
)
cols_tapse_spap <- c("≥0.32" = "#9CA3AF", "<0.32" = "#A63A2A")

# 1) SSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH
samples <- intersect(colnames(data_z), clin_z$Barcode)
meta_hm <- clin_z[match(samples, clin_z$Barcode), ]

ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group        = meta_hm$Group,
  COMPERA      = factor(meta_hm$COMPERA_4strata, levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high")),
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta_hm$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(Group = cols_group, COMPERA = cols_compera, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_z,
  clin = clin_z,
  de = DE_z,
  samples = samples,
  ha = ha,
  title_text = "Zurich: top20 up/down by score\nSSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH"
)

# 2) TAPSE_sPAP (continuous), SSc-PAH only
meta2 <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

samples2 <- meta2$Barcode

ha2 <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  COMPERA      = factor(meta2$COMPERA_4strata, levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high")),
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta2$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(COMPERA = cols_compera, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_z,
  clin = clin_z,
  de = DE_z_TAPSE,
  samples = samples2,
  ha = ha2,
  title_text = "Zurich: top20 up/down by score\nTAPSE_sPAP (continuous), SSc-PAH"
)

# 3) TAPSE_sPAP groups (<0.32 vs ≥0.32), SSc-PAH only
meta3 <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

samples3 <- meta3$Barcode

ha3 <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  COMPERA      = factor(meta3$COMPERA_4strata, levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high")),
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta3$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(COMPERA = cols_compera, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_z,
  clin = clin_z,
  de = DE_z_bin,
  samples = samples3,
  ha = ha3,
  title_text = "Zurich: top20 up/down by score\nTAPSE_sPAP <0.32 vs ≥0.32, SSc-PAH"
)

# 4) COMPERA_number (continuous), SSc-PAH only
meta4 <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(COMPERA_number), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

samples4 <- meta4$Barcode

ha4 <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  COMPERA      = factor(meta4$COMPERA_4strata, levels = c("low","intermediate-low","intermediate-high","high")),
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta4$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(COMPERA = cols_compera, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_z,
  clin = clin_z,
  de = DE_z_comp,
  samples = samples4,
  ha = ha4,
  title_text = "Zurich: top20 up/down by score\nCOMPERA_number (continuous), SSc-PAH"
)
```

```{r heatmaps_scores_poland_tapseGroup, fig.height=10, fig.width=10.8}
# ---- add TAPSE/sPAP group to clin_p once ----
clin_p <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    `TAPSE/sPAP` = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)  ~ NA_character_,
      TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32  ~ "<0.32",
      TRUE               ~ "≥0.32"
    ),
    `TAPSE/sPAP` = factor(`TAPSE/sPAP`, levels = c("≥0.32", "<0.32"))
  )

# ---- colors ----
cols_group <- c("SSc-noPAH"="#004C8C", "SSc-PAH"="#A63A2A")
cols_compera <- c(
  "Low"               = "#9CA3AF",
  "Intermediate-low"  = "#DDB7B2",
  "Intermediate-high" = "#C7685F",
  "High"              = "#A63A2A"
)
cols_origin <- c("Krakow"="orange", "Lublin"="purple")
cols_tapse_spap <- c("≥0.32" = "#9CA3AF", "<0.32" = "#A63A2A")

# 1) SSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH
samples <- intersect(colnames(data_p), clin_p$Barcode)
meta_hm <- clin_p[match(samples, clin_p$Barcode), ]

ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group        = meta_hm$Group,
  COMPERA      = factor(meta_hm$Compera_4strata, levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High")),
  Origin       = meta_hm$Origin,
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta_hm$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(Group = cols_group, COMPERA = cols_compera, Origin = cols_origin, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_p,
  clin = clin_p,
  de = DE_p,
  samples = samples,
  ha = ha,
  title_text = "Poland: top20 up/down by score\nSSc-PAH vs SSc-noPAH"
)

# 2) TAPSE_sPAP (continuous), SSc-PAH only
meta2 <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

samples2 <- meta2$Barcode

ha2 <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  COMPERA      = factor(meta2$Compera_4strata, levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High")),
  Origin       = meta2$Origin,
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta2$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(COMPERA = cols_compera, Origin = cols_origin, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_p,
  clin = clin_p,
  de = DE_p_TAPSE,
  samples = samples2,
  ha = ha2,
  title_text = "Poland: top20 up/down by score\nTAPSE_sPAP (continuous), SSc-PAH"
)

# 3) TAPSE_sPAP groups (<0.32 vs ≥0.32), SSc-PAH only
meta3 <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

samples3 <- meta3$Barcode

ha3 <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  COMPERA      = factor(meta3$Compera_4strata, levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High")),
  Origin       = meta3$Origin,
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta3$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(COMPERA = cols_compera, Origin = cols_origin, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_p,
  clin = clin_p,
  de = DE_p_bin,
  samples = samples3,
  ha = ha3,
  title_text = "Poland: top20 up/down by score\nTAPSE_sPAP <0.32 vs ≥0.32, SSc-PAH"
)

# 4) Compera_number (continuous), SSc-PAH only
meta4 <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Compera_number), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

samples4 <- meta4$Barcode

ha4 <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  COMPERA      = factor(meta4$Compera_4strata, levels = c("Low","Intermediate-low","Intermediate-high","High")),
  Origin       = meta4$Origin,
  `TAPSE/sPAP` = meta4$`TAPSE/sPAP`,
  col = list(COMPERA = cols_compera, Origin = cols_origin, `TAPSE/sPAP` = cols_tapse_spap),
  na_col = "#E5E7EB"
)

plot_top_score_heatmap(
  expr = data_p,
  clin = clin_p,
  de = DE_p_comp,
  samples = samples4,
  ha = ha4,
  title_text = "Poland: top20 up/down by score\nCOMPERA_number (continuous), SSc-PAH"
)
```

## Check Age and Sex

```{r}
# Wilcoxon test (robust, no normality assumption)
age_test_p <- wilcox.test(Age ~ `TAPSE/sPAP`, data = clin_p)

age_test_p

ggplot(clin_p, aes(x = `TAPSE/sPAP`, y = Age, fill = `TAPSE/sPAP`)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Poland cohort: Age by TAPSE/sPAP group",
       y = "Age (years)",
       x = "TAPSE/sPAP group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
# Contingency table
tab_sex_p <- table(clin_p$`TAPSE/sPAP`, clin_p$Sex)
tab_sex_p

# If expected counts are small use Fisher
sex_test_p <- fisher.test(tab_sex_p)
sex_test_p

ggplot(clin_p, aes(x = `TAPSE/sPAP`, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Poland cohort: Sex distribution by TAPSE/sPAP",
       y = "Proportion",
       x = "TAPSE/sPAP group")
```

```{r}
age_test_z <- wilcox.test(Age ~ `TAPSE/sPAP`, data = clin_z)

age_test_z

ggplot(clin_z, aes(x = `TAPSE/sPAP`, y = Age, fill = `TAPSE/sPAP`)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Zurich cohort: Age by TAPSE/sPAP group",
       y = "Age (years)",
       x = "TAPSE/sPAP group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
tab_sex_z <- table(clin_z$`TAPSE/sPAP`, clin_z$Sex)
tab_sex_z

sex_test_z <- fisher.test(tab_sex_z)
sex_test_z
ggplot(clin_z, aes(x = `TAPSE/sPAP`, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Zurich cohort: Sex distribution by TAPSE/sPAP",
       y = "Proportion",
       x = "TAPSE/sPAP group")
```

# Lasso

```{r panel_lasso_functions, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

fit_panel_lasso <- function(
  expr_train, clin_train,
  expr_test,  clin_test,
  cutoff = 0.32,
  use_covariates = FALSE,
  alpha = 1
){
  # --- outcome (SSc-PAH only assumed upstream) ---
  y_train <- ifelse(as.numeric(clin_train$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)
  y_test  <- ifelse(as.numeric(clin_test$TAPSE_sPAP)  < cutoff, 1, 0)

  # --- X matrices: samples x proteins ---
  Xtr_prot <- t(as.matrix(expr_train[, clin_train$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))
  Xte_prot <- t(as.matrix(expr_test[,  clin_test$Barcode,  drop = FALSE]))

  if (!use_covariates) {
    Xtr <- Xtr_prot
    Xte <- Xte_prot
    pf  <- rep(1, ncol(Xtr))
  } else {
    cov_tr <- data.frame(
      Age = as.numeric(clin_train$Age),
      Sex = factor(clin_train$Sex)
    )
    cov_te <- data.frame(
      Age = as.numeric(clin_test$Age),
      Sex = factor(clin_test$Sex, levels = levels(cov_tr$Sex))
    )

    Xtr_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_tr)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
    Xte_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_te)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

    Xtr <- cbind(Xtr_cov, Xtr_prot)
    Xte <- cbind(Xte_cov, Xte_prot)

    # Age/Sex unpenalized, proteins penalized
    pf <- c(rep(0, ncol(Xtr_cov)), rep(1, ncol(Xtr_prot)))
  }

  # --- CV LASSO ---
  set.seed(1)
  cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
    x = Xtr, y = y_train,
    family = "binomial",
    alpha = alpha,
    penalty.factor = pf,
    standardize = TRUE,
    nfolds = 3,
    type.measure = "auc"
  )

  # --- choose lambda giving 3–10 proteins (closest if none) ---
  lambdas <- cvfit$glmnet.fit$lambda
  beta_mat <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit$glmnet.fit, s = lambdas))  # rows = features+intercept, cols = lambdas

  # count proteins only
  feat_names <- rownames(beta_mat)
  prot_idx <- if (!use_covariates) {
    which(feat_names != "(Intercept)")
  } else {
    which(feat_names != "(Intercept)" & !(feat_names %in% colnames(Xtr)[1:(ncol(Xtr) - ncol(Xtr_prot))]))
    # easier: proteins are the columns of Xtr_prot
    which(feat_names %in% colnames(Xtr_prot))
  }

  nprot <- apply(beta_mat[prot_idx, , drop = FALSE] != 0, 2, sum)

  ok <- which(nprot >= 3 & nprot <= 10)
  if (length(ok) > 0) {
    # pick best CV AUC among those (closest to min cvm)
    j <- ok[which.min(cvfit$cvm[match(lambdas[ok], cvfit$lambda)])]
    lambda_use <- lambdas[j]
  } else {
    # pick lambda with nprot closest to 5
    j <- which.min(abs(nprot - 5))
    lambda_use <- lambdas[j]
  }

  # --- final coefficients at chosen lambda ---
  beta <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit, s = lambda_use))
  beta <- beta[beta[,1] != 0, , drop = FALSE]

  # proteins selected (exclude intercept + covariates)
  selected <- rownames(beta)
  selected <- selected[selected != "(Intercept)"]
  if (use_covariates) {
    selected_proteins <- selected[selected %in% colnames(Xtr_prot)]
  } else {
    selected_proteins <- selected
  }

  # --- predict in Poland using locked Zurich model ---
  p_train <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = Xtr, s = lambda_use, type = "response"))
  p_test  <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = Xte, s = lambda_use, type = "response"))

  # AUCs
  auc_train <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y_train, p_train, quiet = TRUE)))
  auc_test  <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(y_test,  p_test,  quiet = TRUE)))

  list(
    cvfit = cvfit,
    lambda_use = lambda_use,
    selected_proteins = selected_proteins,
    beta_nonzero = beta,
    train = data.frame(Barcode = clin_train$Barcode, y = y_train, p = p_train),
    test  = data.frame(Barcode = clin_test$Barcode,  y = y_test,  p = p_test),
    auc_train = auc_train,
    auc_test = auc_test
  )
}

plot_panel_results <- function(res, title_prefix = ""){
  roc_train <- pROC::roc(res$train$y, res$train$p, quiet = TRUE)
  roc_test  <- pROC::roc(res$test$y,  res$test$p,  quiet = TRUE)

  p1 <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = data.frame(
      tpr = rev(roc_train$sensitivities),
      fpr = rev(1 - roc_train$specificities),
      cohort = "Zurich"
    ), aes(fpr, tpr)) +
    geom_line(data = data.frame(
      tpr = rev(roc_test$sensitivities),
      fpr = rev(1 - roc_test$specificities),
      cohort = "Poland"
    ), aes(fpr, tpr)) +
    geom_abline(linetype = 2) +
    labs(
      x = "False positive rate",
      y = "True positive rate",
      title = paste0(
        title_prefix,
        "\nAUC Zurich = ", round(res$auc_train, 2),
        " | AUC Poland = ", round(res$auc_test, 2)
      )
    ) +
    theme_classic()

  df_box <- bind_rows(
    transform(res$train, cohort = "Zurich"),
    transform(res$test,  cohort = "Poland")
  )
  df_box$Group <- factor(ifelse(df_box$y == 1, "<0.32", "≥0.32"), levels = c("≥0.32", "<0.32"))

  p2 <- ggplot(df_box, aes(Group, p)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ cohort) +
    labs(x = "TAPSE/sPAP group", y = "Predicted probability (Low group)") +
    theme_classic()

  list(roc = p1, score_box = p2)
}
```

```{r panel_proteins_only, fig.height=4, fig.width=6.5}
# --- SSc-PAH only + complete cases (TAPSE_sPAP needed for outcome) ---
z_sub <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

p_sub <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

res_prot <- fit_panel_lasso(
  expr_train = data_z,
  clin_train = z_sub,
  expr_test  = data_p,
  clin_test  = p_sub,
  cutoff = 0.32,
  use_covariates = FALSE
)

res_prot$selected_proteins
plots <- plot_panel_results(res_prot, title_prefix = "Panel (proteins only)")
plots$roc
```

```{r panel_proteins_only_box, fig.height=3.8, fig.width=6.5}
plots$score_box
```

```{r panel_proteins_age_sex, fig.height=4, fig.width=6.5}
z_sub2 <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

p_sub2 <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

res_cov <- fit_panel_lasso(
  expr_train = data_z,
  clin_train = z_sub2,
  expr_test  = data_p,
  clin_test  = p_sub2,
  cutoff = 0.32,
  use_covariates = TRUE
)

res_cov$selected_proteins
plots2 <- plot_panel_results(res_cov, title_prefix = "Panel (proteins + Age + Sex)")
plots2$roc
```

```{r panel_proteins_age_sex_box, fig.height=3.8, fig.width=6.5}
plots2$score_box
```

```{r de_zurich_lowTAPSE_vs_noPAH}
# Zurich only: compare SSc-PAH with low TAPSE/sPAP (<0.32) vs SSc-noPAH
meta_z_low_vs_no <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Barcode, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    Group2 = dplyr::case_when(
      Group == "SSc-noPAH" ~ "SSc-noPAH",
      Group == "SSc-PAH" & !is.na(TAPSE_sPAP) & TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32 ~ "SSc-PAH_low",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Group2 = factor(Group2, levels = c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH_low")),
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    Age = as.numeric(Age)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group2)) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Barcode")

# keep complete cases for covariates you want to adjust for
meta_z_low_vs_no <- meta_z_low_vs_no[
  complete.cases(meta_z_low_vs_no[, c("Group2", "Age", "Sex")]),
  , drop = FALSE
]

expr_z_low_vs_no <- as.matrix(data_z[, rownames(meta_z_low_vs_no), drop = FALSE])

design <- model.matrix(~ Group2 + Age + Sex, data = meta_z_low_vs_no)
design[, "Age"] <- rescale(design[, "Age"])

fit <- lmFit(expr_z_low_vs_no, design)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

coef_name <- grep("^Group2", colnames(design), value = TRUE)[1]

DE_z_low_vs_no <- topTable(fit, coef = coef_name, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
DE_z_low_vs_no$Gene <- rownames(DE_z_low_vs_no)

DE_z_low_vs_no_signif <- DE_z_low_vs_no %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.2, abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value)

write.csv(DE_z_low_vs_no,
          file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_Zurich_SScPAH_lowTAPSE_vs_SScnoPAH.csv"),
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(DE_z_low_vs_no_signif,
          file = here::here(output_dir_data, "DE_Zurich_SScPAH_lowTAPSE_vs_SScnoPAH_significant.csv"),
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

n_z_low_vs_no <- ncol(expr_z_low_vs_no)
```

```{r}

# ---- 1. Use Zurich TAPSE binary DE results ----
de_z <- DE_z_bin
de_z$score <- de_z$logFC * (-log10(de_z$P.Value))

# order by absolute score
de_z_ord <- de_z[order(abs(de_z$score), decreasing = TRUE), ]

top5 <- de_z_ord$Gene[1:50]
test <- DE_z_bin_signif %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% dplyr::filter(DE_p_bin, P.Value < 0.05 & abs(logFC) > 0.5)$Gene) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Gene %in% DE_z_low_vs_no_signif$Gene)
test2 <- DE_p_bin %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% test$Gene)
top5 <- test$Gene[1:3]
```

```{r build_additive_score}
# ---- helper to compute signed score ----
compute_panel_score <- function(expr, clin, genes, cutoff = 0.32) {

  # outcome
  y <- ifelse(as.numeric(clin$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)

  # matrix samples x genes
  X <- t(as.matrix(expr[genes, clin$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))

  # z-score per protein within cohort
  Xz <- scale(X)

  # direction from Zurich logFC
  directions <- sign(de_z$logFC[match(genes, de_z$Gene)])

  # additive signed score
  score <- as.numeric(Xz %*% directions)

  data.frame(
    Barcode = clin$Barcode,
    y = y,
    score = score
  )
}
```

```{r evaluate_panel, fig.height=4, fig.width=6.5}
# ---- Zurich SSc-PAH ----
z_sub <- clin_z %>%
  filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)) %>%
  filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

res_z <- compute_panel_score(data_z, z_sub, top5)

# ---- Poland SSc-PAH ----
p_sub <- clin_p %>%
  filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)) %>%
  filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

res_p <- compute_panel_score(data_p, p_sub, top5)

# ---- AUCs ----
auc_z <- as.numeric(auc(roc(res_z$y, res_z$score, quiet=TRUE)))
auc_p <- as.numeric(auc(roc(res_p$y, res_p$score, quiet=TRUE)))

# ---- ROC plot ----
roc_z <- roc(res_z$y, res_z$score, quiet=TRUE)
roc_p <- roc(res_p$y, res_p$score, quiet=TRUE)

ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(
    tpr=rev(roc_z$sensitivities),
    fpr=rev(1-roc_z$specificities)
  ), aes(fpr,tpr), color="black") +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(
    tpr=rev(roc_p$sensitivities),
    fpr=rev(1-roc_p$specificities)
  ), aes(fpr,tpr), color="red") +
  geom_abline(linetype=2) +
  labs(
    x="False positive rate",
    y="True positive rate",
    title=paste0(
      "5-protein panel (by Zurich score)\n",
      "AUC Zurich=", round(auc_z,2),
      " | AUC Poland=", round(auc_p,2)
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r boxplot_panel, fig.height=4, fig.width=6.5}
df_box <- bind_rows(
  transform(res_z, cohort="Zurich"),
  transform(res_p, cohort="Poland")
)

df_box$Group <- factor(ifelse(df_box$y==1,"<0.32","≥0.32"),
                       levels=c("≥0.32","<0.32"))

ggplot(df_box, aes(Group, score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width=0.15, alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~cohort) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x="TAPSE/sPAP group", y="Panel score")
```

```{r panel_poland_train_zurich_test, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# -------------------------
# 1) Subset to SSc-PAH only
# -------------------------
z_sub <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

p_sub <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

# -------------------------
# 2) Outcome: TAPSE/sPAP < 0.32
# -------------------------
cutoff <- 0.32
y_tr <- ifelse(as.numeric(p_sub$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)  # train = Poland
y_te <- ifelse(as.numeric(z_sub$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)  # test  = Zurich

# -------------------------
# 3) X matrices (samples x proteins)
# -------------------------
Xtr_prot <- t(as.matrix(data_p[, p_sub$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))
Xte_prot <- t(as.matrix(data_z[, z_sub$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))

# -------------------------
# 4) Option A: proteins only
# -------------------------
set.seed(1)
cvfit_prot <- cv.glmnet(
  x = Xtr_prot, y = y_tr,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 1,
  standardize = TRUE,
  nfolds = 5,
  type.measure = "auc"
)

# choose lambda that gives 3–10 proteins (otherwise closest to 5)
lambdas <- cvfit_prot$glmnet.fit$lambda
beta_mat <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit_prot$glmnet.fit, s = lambdas))
feat_names <- rownames(beta_mat)
prot_idx <- which(feat_names != "(Intercept)")
nprot <- apply(beta_mat[prot_idx, , drop = FALSE] != 0, 2, sum)

ok <- which(nprot >= 3 & nprot <= 20)
if (length(ok) > 0) {
  j <- ok[which.min(cvfit_prot$cvm[match(lambdas[ok], cvfit_prot$lambda)])]
  lambda_use_prot <- lambdas[j]
} else {
  j <- which.min(abs(nprot - 5))
  lambda_use_prot <- lambdas[j]
}

# selected proteins
beta_use <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit_prot, s = lambda_use_prot))
sel <- rownames(beta_use)[beta_use[,1] != 0]
sel_proteins <- sel[sel != "(Intercept)"]
sel_proteins

# predictions
p_tr <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit_prot, newx = Xtr_prot, s = lambda_use_prot, type = "response"))
p_te <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit_prot, newx = Xte_prot, s = lambda_use_prot, type = "response"))

auc_tr <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_tr, p_tr, quiet=TRUE)))
auc_te <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_te, p_te, quiet=TRUE)))

# ROC plot
roc_tr <- roc(y_tr, p_tr, quiet=TRUE)
roc_te <- roc(y_te, p_te, quiet=TRUE)

p_roc_prot <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(tpr=rev(roc_tr$sensitivities), fpr=rev(1-roc_tr$specificities)),
            aes(fpr,tpr), color="red") +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(tpr=rev(roc_te$sensitivities), fpr=rev(1-roc_te$specificities)),
            aes(fpr,tpr), color="black") +
  geom_abline(linetype=2) +
  labs(
    x="False positive rate", y="True positive rate",
    title=paste0("LASSO panel (proteins only)\nTrain Poland AUC=", round(auc_tr,2),
                 " | Test Zurich AUC=", round(auc_te,2))
  ) +
  theme_classic()

p_roc_prot
```

```{r panel_poland_train_zurich_test_boxplot, fig.height=4, fig.width=6.5}
df_box <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(score = p_tr, y = y_tr, cohort="Poland"),
  data.frame(score = p_te, y = y_te, cohort="Zurich")
)
df_box$Group <- factor(ifelse(df_box$y==1,"<0.32","≥0.32"), levels=c("≥0.32","<0.32"))

ggplot(df_box, aes(Group, score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width=0.15, alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~cohort) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x="TAPSE/sPAP group", y="Predicted probability (Low group)")
```

```{r panel_poland_train_zurich_test_covariates, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# -------------------------
# 5) Option B: proteins + Age + Sex (unpenalized)
# -------------------------
z_sub2 <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

p_sub2 <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

y_tr2 <- ifelse(as.numeric(p_sub2$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)
y_te2 <- ifelse(as.numeric(z_sub2$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)

Xtr_prot2 <- t(as.matrix(data_p[, p_sub2$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))
Xte_prot2 <- t(as.matrix(data_z[, z_sub2$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))

cov_tr <- data.frame(Age = as.numeric(p_sub2$Age), Sex = factor(p_sub2$Sex))
cov_te <- data.frame(Age = as.numeric(z_sub2$Age), Sex = factor(z_sub2$Sex, levels = levels(cov_tr$Sex)))

Xtr_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_tr)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
Xte_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_te)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

Xtr <- cbind(Xtr_cov, Xtr_prot2)
Xte <- cbind(Xte_cov, Xte_prot2)

pf <- c(rep(0, ncol(Xtr_cov)), rep(1, ncol(Xtr_prot2)))

set.seed(1)
cvfit_cov <- cv.glmnet(
  x = Xtr, y = y_tr2,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 1,
  penalty.factor = pf,
  standardize = TRUE,
  nfolds = 5,
  type.measure = "auc"
)

# choose lambda giving 3–10 proteins (otherwise closest to 5)
lambdas <- cvfit_cov$glmnet.fit$lambda
beta_mat <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit_cov$glmnet.fit, s = lambdas))
feat_names <- rownames(beta_mat)

prot_names <- colnames(Xtr_prot2)
prot_idx <- which(feat_names %in% prot_names)

nprot <- apply(beta_mat[prot_idx, , drop = FALSE] != 0, 2, sum)

ok <- which(nprot >= 3 & nprot <= 20)
if (length(ok) > 0) {
  j <- ok[which.min(cvfit_cov$cvm[match(lambdas[ok], cvfit_cov$lambda)])]
  lambda_use_cov <- lambdas[j]
} else {
  j <- which.min(abs(nprot - 5))
  lambda_use_cov <- lambdas[j]
}

beta_use <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit_cov, s = lambda_use_cov))
sel <- rownames(beta_use)[beta_use[,1] != 0]
sel_proteins_cov <- sel[sel %in% prot_names]
sel_proteins_cov

p_tr2 <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit_cov, newx = Xtr, s = lambda_use_cov, type = "response"))
p_te2 <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit_cov, newx = Xte, s = lambda_use_cov, type = "response"))

auc_tr2 <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_tr2, p_tr2, quiet=TRUE)))
auc_te2 <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_te2, p_te2, quiet=TRUE)))

roc_tr2 <- roc(y_tr2, p_tr2, quiet=TRUE)
roc_te2 <- roc(y_te2, p_te2, quiet=TRUE)

p_roc_cov <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(tpr=rev(roc_tr2$sensitivities), fpr=rev(1-roc_tr2$specificities)),
            aes(fpr,tpr), color="red") +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(tpr=rev(roc_te2$sensitivities), fpr=rev(1-roc_te2$specificities)),
            aes(fpr,tpr), color="black") +
  geom_abline(linetype=2) +
  labs(
    x="False positive rate", y="True positive rate",
    title=paste0("LASSO panel (proteins + Age + Sex)\nTrain Poland AUC=", round(auc_tr2,2),
                 " | Test Zurich AUC=", round(auc_te2,2))
  ) +
  theme_classic()

p_roc_cov
```

```{r panel_poland_train_zurich_test_covariates_boxplot, fig.height=4, fig.width=6.5}
df_box2 <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(score = p_tr2, y = y_tr2, cohort="Poland"),
  data.frame(score = p_te2, y = y_te2, cohort="Zurich")
)

df_box2$Group <- factor(ifelse(df_box2$y==1,"<0.32","≥0.32"), levels=c("≥0.32","<0.32"))

ggplot(df_box2, aes(Group, score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width=0.15, alpha=0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~cohort) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("≥0.32","<0.32")),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x="TAPSE/sPAP group", y="Predicted probability (Low group)")
```

```{r panel_poland_train_zurich_preselect50, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --------------------------------------------
# 1) Preselect top 50 proteins (Poland only)
# --------------------------------------------
de_train <- DE_p_bin   # TAPSE group DE in Poland
de_train$score <- de_train$logFC * (-log10(de_train$P.Value))
DE_p_signif_2 <- DE_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val<0.1)
de_train_ord <- de_train[order(abs(de_train$score), decreasing = TRUE), ]
top50 <- de_train_ord %>%
  dplyr::filter(Gene %in% DE_p_signif_2$Gene) %>%
  slice_head(n=50) %>%
  pull(Gene)


length(top50)

# --------------------------------------------
# 2) Subset to SSc-PAH only
# --------------------------------------------
cutoff <- 0.32

p_sub <- clin_p %>%
  filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p))

z_sub <- clin_z %>%
  filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAPSE_sPAP), !is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z))

y_tr <- ifelse(as.numeric(p_sub$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)
y_te <- ifelse(as.numeric(z_sub$TAPSE_sPAP) < cutoff, 1, 0)

# --------------------------------------------
# 3) Build X matrices (only top50 proteins)
# --------------------------------------------
Xtr_prot <- t(as.matrix(data_p[top50, p_sub$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))
Xte_prot <- t(as.matrix(data_z[top50, z_sub$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))

# Age + Sex covariates (unpenalized)
cov_tr <- data.frame(
  Age = as.numeric(p_sub$Age),
  Sex = factor(p_sub$Sex)
)

cov_te <- data.frame(
  Age = as.numeric(z_sub$Age),
  Sex = factor(z_sub$Sex, levels = levels(cov_tr$Sex))
)

Xtr_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_tr)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
Xte_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_te)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

Xtr <- cbind(Xtr_cov, Xtr_prot)
Xte <- cbind(Xte_cov, Xte_prot)

# penalty factor: 0 for covariates, 1 for proteins
pf <- c(rep(0, ncol(Xtr_cov)), rep(1, ncol(Xtr_prot)))

# --------------------------------------------
# 4) LASSO (5-fold CV)
# --------------------------------------------
set.seed(1)

cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = Xtr,
  y = y_tr,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 1,
  penalty.factor = pf,
  standardize = TRUE,
  nfolds = 5,
  type.measure = "auc"
)

# --------------------------------------------
# 5) Choose lambda giving 3–10 proteins
# --------------------------------------------
lambdas <- cvfit$glmnet.fit$lambda
beta_mat <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit$glmnet.fit, s = lambdas))
feat_names <- rownames(beta_mat)

prot_names <- colnames(Xtr_prot)
prot_idx <- which(feat_names %in% prot_names)

nprot <- apply(beta_mat[prot_idx, , drop = FALSE] != 0, 2, sum)

ok <- which(nprot >= 3 & nprot <= 10)

if (length(ok) > 0) {
  j <- ok[which.min(cvfit$cvm[match(lambdas[ok], cvfit$lambda)])]
  lambda_use <- lambdas[j]
} else {
  j <- which.min(abs(nprot - 5))
  lambda_use <- lambdas[j]
}

# selected proteins
beta_use <- as.matrix(coef(cvfit, s = lambda_use))
sel <- rownames(beta_use)[beta_use[,1] != 0]
sel_proteins <- sel[sel %in% prot_names]
sel_proteins

# --------------------------------------------
# 6) Predictions
# --------------------------------------------
p_tr <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = Xtr, s = lambda_use, type = "response"))
p_te <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = Xte, s = lambda_use, type = "response"))

auc_tr <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_tr, p_tr, quiet=TRUE)))
auc_te <- as.numeric(auc(roc(y_te, p_te, quiet=TRUE)))

# --------------------------------------------
# 7) ROC plot
# --------------------------------------------
roc_tr <- roc(y_tr, p_tr, quiet=TRUE)
roc_te <- roc(y_te, p_te, quiet=TRUE)

ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(tpr=rev(roc_tr$sensitivities),
                            fpr=rev(1-roc_tr$specificities)),
            aes(fpr,tpr), color="red") +
  geom_line(data=data.frame(tpr=rev(roc_te$sensitivities),
                            fpr=rev(1-roc_te$specificities)),
            aes(fpr,tpr), color="black") +
  geom_abline(linetype=2) +
  labs(
    x="False positive rate",
    y="True positive rate",
    title=paste0(
      "LASSO (top50 preselected, Age+Sex)\n",
      "Train Poland AUC=", round(auc_tr,2),
      " | Test Zurich AUC=", round(auc_te,2)
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```


```{r panel_score_3groups_both_cohorts, fig.height=4.2, fig.width=8.2, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ---- build function to compute model matrix like in training ----
make_X_cov_prot <- function(clin_df, expr_mat, proteins, cov_levels_sex) {
  # covariates
  cov_df <- data.frame(
    Age = as.numeric(clin_df$Age),
    Sex = factor(clin_df$Sex, levels = cov_levels_sex)
  )
  X_cov <- model.matrix(~ Age + Sex, data = cov_df)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

  # proteins: samples x proteins
  X_prot <- t(as.matrix(expr_mat[proteins, clin_df$Barcode, drop = FALSE]))

  cbind(X_cov, X_prot)
}

# proteins used in the model input (top50 preselected)
proteins_use <- top50

# sex levels must match training (Poland) to get same design matrix columns
sex_levels_train <- levels(factor(p_sub2$Sex))  # from your Poland training subset (Age+Sex model)

# ---- make "all patients" clinical frames for each cohort ----
# Zurich: include SSc-noPAH and SSc-PAH, keep only those with Age/Sex available
z_all <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group %in% c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_z)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    group3 = dplyr::case_when(
      Group == "SSc-noPAH" ~ "SSc-noPAH",
      Group == "SSc-PAH" & !is.na(TAPSE_sPAP) & TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32 ~ "SSc-PAH <0.32",
      Group == "SSc-PAH" & !is.na(TAPSE_sPAP) & TAPSE_sPAP >= 0.32 ~ "SSc-PAH ≥0.32",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(group3))

# Poland
p_all <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group %in% c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Age), !is.na(Sex)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Barcode %in% colnames(data_p)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TAPSE_sPAP = as.numeric(TAPSE_sPAP),
    group3 = dplyr::case_when(
      Group == "SSc-noPAH" ~ "SSc-noPAH",
      Group == "SSc-PAH" & !is.na(TAPSE_sPAP) & TAPSE_sPAP < 0.32 ~ "SSc-PAH <0.32",
      Group == "SSc-PAH" & !is.na(TAPSE_sPAP) & TAPSE_sPAP >= 0.32 ~ "SSc-PAH ≥0.32",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(group3))

# order groups for plotting
group_levels <- c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH ≥0.32", "SSc-PAH <0.32")
z_all$group3 <- factor(z_all$group3, levels = group_levels)
p_all$group3 <- factor(p_all$group3, levels = group_levels)

# ---- compute scores using the locked Poland-trained cvfit at lambda_use ----
X_z_all <- make_X_cov_prot(z_all, data_z, proteins_use, cov_levels_sex = sex_levels_train)
X_p_all <- make_X_cov_prot(p_all, data_p, proteins_use, cov_levels_sex = sex_levels_train)

# probability and linear predictor (eta)
z_prob <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = X_z_all, s = lambda_use, type = "response"))
p_prob <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = X_p_all, s = lambda_use, type = "response"))

z_eta  <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = X_z_all, s = lambda_use, type = "link"))
p_eta  <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit, newx = X_p_all, s = lambda_use, type = "link"))

df_score <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(cohort = "Zurich", Barcode = z_all$Barcode, group3 = z_all$group3,
             prob_low = z_prob, eta = z_eta),
  data.frame(cohort = "Poland", Barcode = p_all$Barcode, group3 = p_all$group3,
             prob_low = p_prob, eta = p_eta)
)


comparisons_list <- list(
  c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH ≥0.32"),
  c("SSc-noPAH", "SSc-PAH <0.32"),
  c("SSc-PAH ≥0.32", "SSc-PAH <0.32")
)

ggplot(df_score, aes(group3, prob_low)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ cohort) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons_list,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.format",
    step.increase = 0.08
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "LASSO score (predicted P[Low TAPSE/sPAP])")
```

```{r cox_zurich_compera_plus_lasso, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(survival)
library(broom)
library(dplyr)

# ---- 1) Zurich SSc-PAH: assemble survival dataframe ----
# df_score must exist and contain: cohort, Barcode, eta (or prob_low)
score_z <- df_score %>%
  dplyr::filter(cohort == "Zurich") %>%
  dplyr::select(Barcode, eta, prob_low)

df_surv_z <- clin_z %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
  dplyr::select(Barcode, COMPERA_number, DeathDAYS, Death) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(score_z, by = "Barcode") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    COMPERA_number = as.numeric(COMPERA_number),
    Death_event = ifelse(Death %in% c("yes", "Yes", "TRUE", "1", 1), 1, 0),
    DeathDAYS = as.numeric(DeathDAYS)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(DeathDAYS), !is.na(Death_event), !is.na(COMPERA_number), !is.na(eta))

# ---- 2) Fit Cox models ----
m0 <- coxph(Surv(DeathDAYS, Death_event) ~ COMPERA_number, data = df_surv_z)
m1 <- coxph(Surv(DeathDAYS, Death_event) ~ eta, data = df_surv_z)
m2 <- coxph(Surv(DeathDAYS, Death_event) ~ COMPERA_number + eta, data = df_surv_z)

# ---- 3) Summaries (HR, CI, p) ----
tab0 <- broom::tidy(m0, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
tab1 <- broom::tidy(m1, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
tab2 <- broom::tidy(m2, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)

tab0$model <- "COMPERA"
tab1$model <- "LASSO score (eta)"
tab2$model <- "COMPERA + LASSO score"

cox_tables <- dplyr::bind_rows(tab0, tab1, tab2)
cox_tables

# ---- 4) Likelihood ratio tests: does score add info beyond COMPERA? ----
anova_m0_m2 <- anova(m0, m2, test = "LRT")
anova_m0_m2

# ---- 5) C-index (concordance) ----
c0 <- summary(m0)$concordance[1]
c1 <- summary(m1)$concordance[1]
c2 <- summary(m2)$concordance[1]
data.frame(
  model = c("COMPERA", "LASSO score", "COMPERA + LASSO score"),
  c_index = c(c0, c1, c2)
)
```


```{r lasso_poland_train_zurich_preselect50_fit_and_score, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(dplyr)

# ---- 1) Preselect proteins (training cohort only: Poland) ----
de_train <- DE_p_bin
de_train$score <- de_train$logFC * (-log10(de_train$P.Value))

DE_p_signif_2 <- DE_p %>% dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)

de_train_ord <- de_train[order(abs(de_train$score), decreasing = TRUE), ]

# keep your intersection logic; if fewer than 50, it's fine
top50 <- de_train_ord %>%
  dplyr::filter(Gene %in% DE_p_signif_2$Gene) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 25) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Gene)

length(top50)

# ---- 2) SSc-PAH only for classification ----
cutoff <- 0.32

p_sub <- clin_p %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "SSc-PAH") %>%
```
